transcript:
Speaker A: भैया दिन के कितने लोग आते होंगे यहाँ? [Brother, how many people come here in a day?] 
Speaker B: Around 25,000 people come here daily. 
Speaker A: वाह! और इसमें से कितने फॉरेनर्स होते होंगे? [Wow! And how many of those would be foreigners?] 
Speaker B: Out of those 25,000 people, at least 2,000 are foreigners. Rest all Indians. 
Speaker A: आपने फॉरेनर्स से बात करके इंग्लिश सीख ली हाँ? [You learned English by talking to foreigners, right?] 
Speaker B: अरे नहीं! फॉरेनर्स से बात करने के लिए इंग्लिश सीखनी पड़ी। [Oh no! I had to learn English to talk to foreigners.] 
Speaker A: तो आपने सीखा कहाँ से? [So where did you learn it from?] 
Speaker B: वो मैंने MySivi ऐप से सीखा। [I learned that from the MySivi app.] 
Speaker A: MySivi ऐप? वो क्या है? [MySivi app? What is that?] 
Speaker B: इस ऐप में एक AI टीचर है जो बिना जजमेंट के इंग्लिश सिखाती है और गलतियां हुई तो तुरंत करेक्ट भी कर देती है। [In this app, there is an AI teacher who teaches English without judgment and corrects mistakes immediately if they happen.] 
Speaker A: पर आपको टाइम कहाँ से मिलता है? [But where do you find the time?] 
Speaker B: ज़्यादा टाइम की ज़रूरत नहीं है, बस दिन का 10-15 मिनट प्रैक्टिस करता हूँ, and my English is getting better and better every single day. [Not much time is needed, I just practice 10-15 minutes a day, and my English is getting better and better every single day.] 
Speaker A: अच्छा बढ़िया! पर ये ऐप तो महंगा होगा ना? [Great! But this app must be expensive, right?] 
Speaker B: बिल्कुल नहीं! मैंने सिर्फ ₹1 में शुरू किया था। तुम भी कर सकते हो। [Not at all! I started for just ₹1. You can too.] 
Speaker A: अरे वाह! फिर मैं अभी के अभी MySivi ऐप इंस्टॉल करता हूँ। [Oh wow! Then I will install the MySivi app right now.] 
Speaker C: Install now पे क्लिक करो और MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Click on install now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: BHAIYA [Brother], KITNE LOG AATE [How many people come], AROUND 25,000 PEOPLE DAILY, AUR ISME SE [And out of these], FOREIGNERS, OUT OF THOSE 2000 ARE, REST ALL INDIANS, ENGLISH SEEKH LI [Learned English], AREY NAHI [Oh no], ENGLISH SEEKHNI PADI [Had to learn English], TO AAPNE SEEKHA KAHA SE [So where did you learn it from], MYSIVI APP, WO KYA HAI [What is that], MySivi, Arya AI Teacher, Practice Now, Your Learning Path, Talk about anything, Daily routine, Let's Improve Vocabulary, Talk about your childhood, Seasons and weather, Family and Relationships, Hobbies and Interests, Hey! What did you do over the weekend?, I go to the beach and eat ice cream., Almost perfect! Just a small correction: I went to the beach and ate ice cream, PAR AAPKO TIME KAHA SE [But where do you get time], ZAROORAT [Need], 10-15 MIN PRACTICE, AND MY ENGLISH BETTER EVERY SINGLE DAY, ACHA BADHIYA [Great], MEHENGA [Expensive], BILKUL NAHI [Not at all], SIRF EK RUPEE [Just one rupee], TUM BHI [You too], Sale Ends Today, UNLOCK EVERYTHING, 3 days for ₹30 ₹1, Then ₹299/month, MySivi Pro Benefits, 24/7 Personal AI English Teacher, 500+ Lessons, Start Trial at ₹1, AREY WAH [Oh wow], ABHI KE ABHI INSTALL [Install right now], MySivi AI English Speaking..., Master Spoken English, MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: A boatman near the Taj Mahal impresses a couple with his fluent English, attributing his skills to the MySivi app. He explains that the app's AI teacher corrects grammar instantly without judgment, requiring only 10-15 minutes of daily practice. The ad concludes with a promotional offer to start using the app for just ₹1.
